terms.name: Workflow
terms.definition: Governed institutional process with versioning and audit history

terms.name: Trigger
terms.definition: Event or schedule that initiates workflow execution

terms.name: Approval Gate
terms.definition: Human review checkpoint that automation cannot bypass

terms.name: Automation Step
terms.definition: Governed action executed by the workflow engine

terms.name: Workflow Execution
terms.definition: Running instance with full evidence trail

terms.name: Automation Level
terms.definition: Degree of automation from suggestion-only to fully automatic

terms.name: Escalation
terms.definition: Automatic notification when workflow requires Human attention

terms.name: Workflow Template
terms.definition: Reusable pattern for common institutional processes

terms.name: Workflow Evidence
terms.definition: Permanent record of trigger, actions, and outcomes

terms.name: Failure Recovery
terms.definition: Retry, rollback, or manual intervention path

terms.name: Connector
terms.definition: Governed outbound integration to external systems

terms.name: AI Workflow Coordinator
terms.definition: Advisory AI for design, optimization, and explanation

terms.name: Workflow Audit
terms.definition: Immutable audit trail for every workflow event

terms.name: Long-Running Workflow
terms.definition: Workflow that may pause, wait, or resume across time

terms.name: Institutional Memory
terms.definition: Automation history contributing to organizational learning

terms.name: Workflow Security
terms.definition: Permission, role, and rate-limit enforcement per workflow
